title: Editas Medicine Q2 2024 Earnings Results and Business Updates
text: Editas Medicine reported Q2 2024 net loss of $67.6 million or $0.82 per share compared to $40.3 million or $0.56 per share in Q2 2023. Cash position remained strong at $318.3 million in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities as of June 30, 2024. Research and development expenses jumped $24.4 million to $54.2 million, primarily driven by clinical and manufacturing costs related to accelerated progression of the reni-cel program. General and administrative expenses rose modestly by $1.0 million to $18.2 million. The company made progress on three strategic pillars: reni-cel for sickle cell disease completed adolescent cohort enrollment in RUBY trial and planned to present clinical data by year-end 2024; reni-cel for beta thalassemia was on track to share additional EdiTHAL trial data by year-end 2024; and in vivo medicines with expected preclinical proof-of-concept for undisclosed indication by end of 2024. Management expects current financial resources to fund operations into 2026.
